title: Public Finance Payment Infrastructure Services Agreement

clauses.title: Scope of Services
clauses.text: The vendor will provide payment infrastructure services, including transaction routing, payment initiation support, reconciliation tools, and related technical support services.

clauses.title: Data Processing
clauses.text: The vendor may process financial and personal data to the extent necessary for performance of the services and will comply with applicable data protection law.

clauses.title: Fees and Payment
clauses.text: The authority will pay the vendor the agreed service fees in accordance with the pricing schedule set out in the commercial annex.

clauses.title: Confidentiality
clauses.text: Each party will keep confidential all non-public business, technical, and financial information received from the other party and will not disclose such information except as required by law.

clauses.title: Liability
clauses.text: The vendor’s liability under this agreement is limited to direct losses and capped at the total fees paid under the agreement in the twelve months preceding the relevant claim.

clauses.title: Service Availability
clauses.text: The vendor will use commercially reasonable efforts to maintain availability of the payment infrastructure services and provide notice of material service interruptions.

clauses.title: Termination
clauses.text: Either party may terminate the agreement for material breach if such breach is not remedied within thirty days of written notice.

clauses.title: Intellectual Property
clauses.text: All intellectual property rights in the vendor’s systems, software, documentation, and underlying infrastructure remain vested in the vendor.
